title: Tunisian Prosciutto Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic one-pot dish that combines the crunch of prosciutto with the warmth of Tunisian spices. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the Savoury Pilaf Mix and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the pilaf is tender.
While the pilaf is cooking, cook the prosciutto slices in a pan over medium heat until crispy.
Flake the cooked prosciutto into small pieces and set aside.
Once the pilaf is cooked, fluff it with a fork and stir in the chopped parsley and crispy prosciutto.
